topic: Template Set 3 - Luminous Product Hero Locked Bottle
continuity_tokens: real Mitozz bottle design stays intact
real white cap finish stays intact
real front label structure and placement stay intact
lighting direction must match the surrounding scene
contact shadow must feel grounded and realistic
visual_intent: real bottle kept intact inside a luminous editorial environment
negative space for short Japanese copy
brand_guardrails: keep the real bottle design intact
do not redesign, recolor, simplify, or relabel the bottle
match light direction, color temperature, and shadow softness across bottle and environment
make the bottle feel naturally grounded on the surface
avoid flashy supplement-ad energy and cluttered props
composition: real bottle on a believable premium surface
cloud-white and mist-blue environment with restrained apricot warmth
ample negative space for one short Japanese headline and one secondary line
editorial calm with realistic bottle-to-scene integration
reference_strategy: Use the real bottle source as immutable product truth, then use product-glow and editorial-whitespace to shape the atmosphere around it without altering the package.
variation_guardrails: vary environment and crop without changing the bottle identity
keep the glow restrained and premium rather than ad-like
preserve realistic scale and grounded surface contact
reject any result where the bottle drifts from the approved source design

slides_ja: サブラインのプレースホルダー

notes: Locked bottle workflow for Set 3. The bottle is product truth and the environment must adapt around it with realistic lighting, shadow, scale, and grounded contact.
